title: Pass-the-Cert / UnPAC-the-Hash via Certipy auth
description: Detects authentication using a stolen or forged certificate (pass-the-cert) and PKINIT UnPAC-the-hash, where Certipy 'auth' is used with a .pfx to obtain a TGT and recover the account NT hash from the PAC. Rubeus asktgt with /getcredentials /certificate performs the equivalent.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( (('Command Line' like '*certipy*' and 'Command Line' like '*auth*')) and (('Command Line' like '*-pfx*' or 'Command Line' like '*.pfx*')) ) or (('Command Line' like '*asktgt*' and 'Command Line' like '*/getcredentials*')))
